---
name: Feature / component request
about: Suggest a new component, token, or doc section
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What I want

What's the component / feature / token you'd like to see?

## Why

What problem does this solve? What are you currently doing instead?

## Where it would live

- New `mk-…` component? Where in the catalogue?
- Extension to an existing component?
- New design token?
- New doc / reference?

## Mockups / sketches

If you have a Figma file, screenshot, or even a napkin sketch, drop it here.

## Alternatives considered

Any other DS / pattern that already does this well? What's missing or different about how MK-DS should do it?
